zh.lifeSummary: 當GEOFFREY I de NEVILLE , Baron Neville of Horncastle, Circuit Justice of Yorkshire於1098年出生在英國英格蘭達勒姆拉比 卡素時，他的父親GILBERT de NEVILLE28歲，母親Nevi NEVILLE18歲。他於1127年與FNU MNU married NEVILLE在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1146年在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾霍卡斯特爾享年48歲。

nameMeanings.name: NEVILLE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

variants.name: Nevills
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Nevil
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Newill

variants.name: Nevill
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: GEOFFREY
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When GEOFFREY I de NEVILLE , Baron Neville of Horncastle, Circuit Justice of Yorkshire was born in 1098, in Raby Castle, Durham, England, United Kingdom, his father, GILBERT de NEVILLE, was 28 and his mother, Nevi NEVILLE, was 18. He married FNU MNU married NEVILLE in 1127, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1146, in Horncastle, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 48.

Il a épousé FNU MNU married NEVILLE en 1127, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1146, à Horncastle, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: GEOFFREY I de NEVILLE , Baron Neville of Horncastle, Circuit Justice of Yorkshireが1098年にイギリスイギリスダルハムラビー カストルで生まれた時，父GILBERT de NEVILLEは28歳，母Nevi NEVILLEは18歳であった。1127年にイギリスイギリスでFNU MNU married NEVILLEと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1146年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアホールンカストルで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: GEOFFREY I de NEVILLE , Baron Neville of Horncastle, Circuit Justice of Yorkshire(이)가 1098년 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 라비 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 GILBERT de NEVILLE(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Nevi NEVILLE(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1127년 영국 잉글랜드에서 FNU MNU married NEVILLE(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1146년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 호른카스틀에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда GEOFFREY I de NEVILLE , Baron Neville of Horncastle, Circuit Justice of Yorkshire родился в 1098 г. в местности раби кастл, дурам, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени GILBERT de NEVILLE было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Nevi NEVILLE, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени FNU MNU married NEVILLE в 1127 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1146 г. в местности хаурнкастл, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет.
